nodes.label: AI as thinking partner for idea exploration
nodes.label_negative: AI as absent or unavailable for feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to run through ideas I have about certain projects, more so to have a trailing thought process and receive some feedback from it

nodes.label: AI as confidence-building assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of doubt or error
nodes.grounding_span: Having AI so readily available has helped my confidence when working alone

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I have found that it is always accurate so this is no longer a concern for me

nodes.label: AI as practical tool for calculations and conversions
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or untrustworthy for calculations
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to do some basic maths... I asked for a conversion and briefly, for reasoning

nodes.label: AI as assistant vs director in creative decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI as director overriding human control
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely feel in control of the creative decisions. The AI feels like an assistant rather than a director

nodes.label: AI spatial understanding for pattern making
nodes.grounding_span: if the AI's understanding of space and connection improved, it could help in other areas such as pattern making

nodes.label: Creative confidence and self-trust
nodes.grounding_span: builds my confidence enough to feel as though I can trust my instincts

nodes.label: Autonomy and control in creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely feel in control of the creative decisions

nodes.label: Expanded capability through AI assistance
nodes.grounding_span: this would change the game for me

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for idea feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to run through ideas I have about certain projects

nodes.label: Confidence in AI accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I have found that it is always accurate so this is no longer a concern for me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as assistant
nodes.grounding_span: The AI feels like an assistant rather than a director

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of AI evolution in pattern making
nodes.grounding_span: if AI were able to create a multipiece pattern spread out across printable A4 paper, this would change the game for me

nodes.label: Iterative validation seeking — uses AI to confirm own judgments
nodes.grounding_span: Having AI reiterate that builds my confidence enough to feel as though I can trust my instincts

nodes.label: Context-dependent tool use — uses AI when alone, colleagues when available
nodes.grounding_span: If I am working in store, I tend not to use it as much because I can talk to colleagues
